mechanism_narrative: A lower FEDFUNDS rate transmits through a lower discount rate and easier financial conditions, lifting S&P 500 prices over the next month. The signal is strongest when inflation is not accelerating, because rate cuts then read as supportive policy rather than a recession alarm.
failure_condition: Reject if lower FEDFUNDS values do not coincide with higher 20d forward SPX returns after controlling for CPIAUCSL, or if the sign flips positive for tightening episodes in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above a stress threshold signals weakening household income and demand, leading equity investors to reprice cyclical earnings lower over the next month. The effect should be negative once unemployment is clearly rising, but not when it is flat.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment rises are followed by positive 20d SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the triggered sample shows a positive rank correlation over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint upturn in RSAFS and PAYEMS indicates broadening nominal demand and labor income growth, which should support corporate revenues and produce positive S&P 500 returns over the following month. The effect is not decomposable into either series alone; the signal requires both to improve together.
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term does not outperform either standalone proxy in walk-forward tests, or if simultaneous positive changes in RSAFS and PAYEMS fail to yield above-baseline 20d SPX returns.

mechanism_narrative: A rising INDPRO trend signals improving industrial output and stronger real activity, which should lift earnings expectations and support equity returns over the next quarter. The effect is directional only when industrial production is expanding rather than contracting.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO trend episodes do not predict positive 60d SPX returns, or if the signal becomes negative in more than half of recovery episodes across any 4-quarter rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts rebound in HOUST signals improving construction demand and a broader cyclical pickup, which should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal is strongest when housing is emerging from weakness rather than already at elevated levels.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises by at least 5% versus its 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if housing-starts breakout episodes fail to deliver positive 20d SPX returns more often than not, or if the average forward return is indistinguishable from zero in triggered samples.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL rises quickly while FEDFUNDS remains near the floor, real rates become more negative and policy stays accommodative, which should support equity multiples over the next 20 trading days. The mechanism fails if high inflation is interpreted as imminent tightening rather than real-rate relief.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation exceeds 4% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.5%
failure_condition: Reject if high-inflation/low-rate episodes do not outperform unconditional 20d SPX returns, or if the sign becomes negative once the trigger is active in a majority of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A falling PAYEMS level signals payroll contraction and weaker expected consumer spending, which should pressure S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect is strongest when payroll losses persist for multiple months rather than appearing as a one-off noise print.
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive payroll declines do not lead to negative 20d SPX returns more often than positive returns, or if the conditional mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous weakness in GDPC1 and RSAFS marks a broad demand slowdown that should weigh on earnings revisions and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The signal is regime-conditional because it matters most once the economy has already shifted into slowdown rather than during temporary quarterly noise.
failure_condition: Reject if joint GDP and retail-sales weakness fails to predict negative 60d SPX returns, or if the interaction signal loses sign consistency across successive slowdown episodes.
